user.title: Add Update Blocklist
user.description: This integration lets you permanently block firmware updates for specific devices.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single Update Blocklist instance is allowed.

init.title: Scan window
init.description: The integration briefly re-enables blocked update entities during this nightly window to refresh last-known version info, then re-disables them.

error.invalid_time: Time must be in HH:MM (24h) format.
error.invalid_duration: Duration must be at least 1 minute.
error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be at least 10 seconds.

block.name: Block device updates
block.description: Permanently block updates for a device.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Home Assistant device ID to block.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Free-form note explaining why this device is blocked.

scan_now.name: Scan a single block
scan_now.description: Refresh the shadow version for one block immediately.

scan_all.name: Scan all blocks
scan_all.description: Run a full scan cycle across all blocks immediately.
